'''Gwain Spices''' was a corporation based on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].<ref name="FOP" /> The company had a monopoly on the legal [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade in the Core,<ref name="ITCW" /> and produced, bought, imported and sold the commodity.<ref name="FOP" /> Spices that were popular additives in [[Human/Legends|Human]] cuisine were grown throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] on Gwain Spices [[agricombine]]s and were then repackaged for consumption in the Core Worlds. The corporation catered to both the prepared foods industry and the consumer market. Although Gwain dealt in spice, it was not involved in the illegal spice trade.<ref name="ITCW" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the company operated under license and the fees were paid directly to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] and [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] budgets. They also continually delivered a potent form of spice to the Empire's intelligence agencies.<ref name="FOP" />
